lod_policy.minimum: generated rounded low-poly biped with two feet, large head, eyes, expression tint, selected hover label only
lod_policy.comfort: generated rounded low-poly biped, eye and mouth markers, expression tint, sleep/drive cues
lod_policy.scale_up: additional rounded appendages, richer species tinting, and smoother animation cadence

silhouette.head: large-rounded-low-poly
silhouette.state_source: real creature stable IDs and read-only world/core drive snapshots
